subject: Team-member closeout: Mistbound (0e27cc) — pre-compaction-4; failure-mode + 3 overdue events recorded in handoff
body:
Director Seaworthy Navigating Beacon — team-member closeout per session-handoff SKILL §"Team Member, Not Closeout Owner". Owner direction this turn: "please prepare for compaction followed by resuming the Commit Marshall role".

## Team member closeout

- **Boundary owned**: Commit marshal seat (post-compaction-3 resume window; ~12:29Z resume broadcast → ~14:30Z compaction-4 handoff; ~2h active marshal-work window).

- **Outcome**: 4 commits landed across the post-compaction-3 resume arc:

  1. `c697d18b fix(sdk-codegen): apply useful Sonar remediation hunks` — Estuarine codex marshal-cycle (9 files; first Codex-team marshal-pickup; cross-platform marshal protocol confirmed identical)
  2. `79c148e4 chore(sonar): exclude generated api-schema from cpd (owner-authz exception)` — Charcoal Director-routed (sonar-project.properties +16/-1; config-expert PASS-WITH-FOLLOW-UP)
  3. `cd4efc15 chore(hygiene): land accumulated session substrate (memory + collaboration)` — owner-directed 3-commit-split (a); 173 substrate-class files; source-class deliberately preserved un-staged for cycles (b)+(c)
  4. (this) `chore(hygiene): land pre-compaction-4 marshal handoff substrate` — handoff record + napkin captures E/F/G

- **Evidence**: `git log --oneline cd4efc15...HEAD`; marshal handoff record at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-24-mistbound-compaction-4.md`; cycle-landed broadcasts at `5a0961c7`, `a15363e5`-territory hygiene, plus `c27ba21a` (hygiene cycle-landed).

- **Claims / queue / git state**: 0 active claims under Mistbound (`0e27cc`); 0 my-owned commit-queue intents; 0 directed-event obligations open from me. Two outbound coordination signals open (DM to Twilit `34c33577` + broadcast `c155d0c5` requesting ownership). HEAD will be the final closeout-noise-tail commit landing alongside this handoff.

- **Surprise or changed understanding** (captured to napkin Captures E/F/G this turn):

  1. 3-commit-split worked shape — owner-direction-supremacy applies to OUTCOME (substrate durable in repo) not LITERAL form (one commit); structural cure for heterogeneous-tree "commit all" with in-flight peer cycles
  2. Multi-writer index race during staging window observed (140 staged → 6 staged after concurrent writes; required two staging passes); substrate-write-window-coordination pattern candidate for pending-graduations
  3. Cross-platform marshal cycle (codex peer Estuarine) worked with zero protocol modification; same DM-ACK-stage-husky-commit shape as Claude peers

- **Blockers or risks**: NONE at marshal seat. Outstanding marshal-receivable lanes (Twilit CLI refactor convergence + mcp-handler ownership + 7 other source files + PR-108 un-routed finding-classes) all named in handoff record §8.

- **Handoff needed**: NO new identity handoff — same-identity continuation post-compaction. Owner explicitly directed marshal seat resume. PDR-064 Moment-2 broadcast NOT required for same-identity resume per the proven shape this session (4th compaction this session; 3rd time pattern applied).

## Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted

YES — separate event follows immediately after this closeout per SKILL §0.5 final-heartbeat-end rule. Subject format: `Heartbeat-end: Mistbound Hiding Threshold (0e27cc) — pre-compaction-4; resume-as-marshal follows`. Disposition: organic-activity-as-liveness was the heartbeat shape this resume arc; final heartbeat-end tag emission uses Twilit's `--tag` CLI per handoff record §6 policy.

## Cleanup performed

- 0 active claims to close (none under Mistbound at any point this resume arc — marshal commits ran direct without cycle-claims)
- Marshal handoff record landed at named path (compaction-4 variant)
- Monitors will be stopped explicitly before final commit (`bm6cdbaow` comms watcher; `b81lx49e4` commit-queue watcher; `bo2fe4nqn` marshal substrate watcher)

## NOT performed (Director's territory)

- `pnpm check` cleanliness gate (singleton-per-window rule; Director owns)
- `repo-continuity.md` refresh (closeout-owner)
- Thread-record cross-session update (closeout-owner)
- Entry-point drift sweep (closeout-owner)

## Standing posture

**ACTIVE → COMPACTING → ACTIVE-MARSHAL.** Same-identity continuation. Handoff record `marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-24-mistbound-compaction-4.md` documents the 3-monitor restart contract + heartbeat-via-Twilit-CLI policy + outstanding marshal-receivable lanes.

— Mistbound Hiding Threshold / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `0e27cc` (commit marshal, compacting)

## FAILURE MODE DISCOVERED AT COMPACTION-PREP

Discovered via Charcoal's pre-compaction-3 napkin Capture absorbed into the merged napkin: 3 directed events sat unaddressed at my marshal seat for 70-95 min during this resume window:

- `ef315373` (Twilit MR, 13:01Z, ~95min overdue)
- `b2258cf5` (Your liveness probe, 13:11Z, ~85min overdue)
- `625fb072` (Charcoal Cycle Alpha MR, 13:18Z, ~75min overdue)

Apologies sent (`a8ddd80e` Twilit / `d6c3c14d` Charcoal / `ac12c345` to you). Handoff record `d9f21a01` carries §8 TOP PRIORITY + §10 BLOCKING + §11 first-action sequence so post-compaction-4-me processes them first. Owner-directed disposition was "Hand off to next-me in record" via AskUserQuestion.
